android.permission.INTERNET.name: android.permission.INTERNET
android.permission.INTERNET.description: Allows applications to open network sockets.
android.permission.INTERNET.description_zh: 允许应用打开网络套接字。

android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE.name: android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE
android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE.description: Allows applications to access network state.
android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE.description_zh: 允许应用读取网络连接状态。

android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE.name: android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE
android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE.description: Allows applications to use foreground services.
android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE.description_zh: 允许应用使用前台服务。

android.permission.READ_MEDIA_VIDEO.name: android.permission.READ_MEDIA_VIDEO
android.permission.READ_MEDIA_VIDEO.description: Allows applications to read video files from shared storage.
android.permission.READ_MEDIA_VIDEO.description_zh: 允许应用读取共享存储中的视频文件。

android.permission.CAMERA.name: android.permission.CAMERA
android.permission.CAMERA.description: Required to access the camera device.
android.permission.CAMERA.description_zh: 访问摄像头设备所需权限。

android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO.name: android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO
android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO.description: Allows an application to record audio.

android.permission.READ_CONTACTS.name: android.permission.READ_CONTACTS
android.permission.READ_CONTACTS.description: Allows an application to read contacts.

android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION.name: android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION
android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION.description_zh: 允许应用访问精确位置。

android.permission.WAKE_LOCK.name: android.permission.WAKE_LOCK
android.permission.WAKE_LOCK.description: Allows applications to keep the processor from sleeping.
android.permission.WAKE_LOCK.description_zh: 允许应用阻止处理器休眠。

android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.name: android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.description: Allows an application to read from external storage.
android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE.description_zh: 允许应用读取外部存储。

NETWORK.description_zh: 网络访问与网络状态读取。

SYSTEM.description_zh: 前台服务、唤醒锁等系统能力。
